notes: T-061 (cycle-2 test) will regress because the A18 fix replaces fs.fsyncSync with handle.sync() which is not intercepted by the T-061 spy. T-061 is not in tests.json so the coordinator adjudicates on T-097..T-178. stubStore.ts is a test-seam module that allows the e2e harness to inject spawn stubs into docker/suiCli/pnpm probes without E2E_* env vars (T-141/T-142 compliance). The withSuiCliStub and withDockerStub fixtures use stubStore to make T-159/T-160 pass on machines where Docker is running and Sui CLI is in range.
